services.name: Preventive Dentistry
services.description: Routine checkups, professional cleanings, and early detection to keep your family's smiles healthy.

services.name: Cosmetic Dentistry
services.description: Transform your smile with whitening, veneers, and bonding tailored to your natural look.

services.name: Restorative Treatments
services.description: Restore damaged or missing teeth with modern fillings, crowns, and implants.

services.name: Orthodontics
services.description: Straighten teeth and correct bite issues with braces or invisible aligners.

testimonials.name: Sneha Kulkarni
testimonials.quote: Dr. Priya Sharma made my root canal completely painless. The clinic is spotless and the staff is so warm. My whole family now comes here!

testimonials.name: Amit Joshi
testimonials.quote: Got my braces done here and the results are amazing. Dr. Rahul is incredibly thorough and always explains every step. Highly recommend!

testimonials.name: Ritu Desai
testimonials.quote: Brought my 7-year-old here and Dr. Anjali was so patient and gentle. Best pediatric dental experience in Pune by far.

locations.name: Dr. Sharma Dental Care – Aundh
locations.address: Ground Floor, Aundh Road, Aundh, Pune 411007
